title: Assistant Store Manager - Landmark Group India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Landmark Group India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Landmark Group India in Madurai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Landmark Group India:
Landmark Group India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Group India!
